title: Twisted mimics
description: A horror mod that adds twisted creatures to your world.
body:
Twisted Mimics
Atmospheric horror mod that subtly transforms the familiar Minecraft world into something unsettling.

Over time, something starts to feel… off.
The world grows more tense, quieter—and somehow more alive at the same time.
Sometimes strange things happen. Sometimes they are a little too strange.

Key Features
Distorted Monsters: TwistedMimics adds horrifying, warped creatures to your world that hunger for your demise. Each one wields unique powers, making every encounter deadly.

Death Counter: A persistent counter appears in the corner of your screen. Every death increments it, progressively empowering monsters and triggering new events based on its value.

Dynamic Events: Failing increases the stakes—monsters grow stronger, and the world unleashes horrors tailored to your death toll.

Perfect for players seeking hardcore survival where the price of every mistake skyrockets. Dive into paranoia and tension like never before.



Visit the Discord channel to find out news about the project!
